src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.general_idea: Refactor circuit breaker configuration to support distinct breakers for web client and repository components.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Refactor error handling logic to use onErrorMap for cleaner exception transformation.
Introduce ConditionalLogger for sampling-based logging to reduce log volume.
Add specific handling for DataBufferLimitException to log request size violations.
Extract metric recording logic into a helper method to reduce code duplication.
Remove unused import for the legacy Dropwizard metrics Timer class.
Replace specific GraphiteMetricsRecorder import with the generic MetricsRecorder interface.
Add import for the new MetricsRecorderTimer inner class.
Add import for Spring's @Value annotation to support configuration injection.
Remove unused constant LOCALHOST as it is no longer used in the logic.
Update constructor to accept the generic MetricsRecorder interface instead of the concrete GraphiteMetricsRecorder implementation.
Rename constructor parameter circuitBreaker to webClientCircuitBreaker for clarity.
Add sampling rate configuration injection via @Value annotation.
Pass sampling rate to the parent class constructor.
Update field assignment to use the renamed circuit breaker variable.
Update timer context creation to use the new non-optional API method.
Update timer context parameter type to the new MetricsRecorderTimer class.
Simplify host validation logic by removing localhost check and using case-insensitive string matching.
Update metric recording method from mark() to increment() for failure metrics.
Update metric recording method from mark() to increment() for success metrics.
Update metric recording method from mark() to increment() for failure metrics in updateProxyMetrics.
Remove explicit circuit breaker transformation and timeout from the repository lookup chain.
Refactor createServerResponse method to improve indentation and readability.
Rename the metrics recorder interface from GraphiteMetricsRecorder to MetricsRecorder to decouple the handler from a specific backend implementation.
Refactor circuit breaker application to move from repository operations to HTTP client operations.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: Runtime logic change: Circuit breakers are no longer applied to repository saves but to secondary cache HTTP calls, likely due to architectural changes in error handling.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Rename circuit breaker variable to clarify its scope is for web client operations.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/helpers/J.general_idea: Add explicit logging for JSON deserialization failures to improve observability.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Add prefix placeholder constant for metric naming.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.why_exists: The new implementation uses string replacement for metric prefixes; this constant is required for the logic to work correctly.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Add helper method for prefix-based counter creation.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.why_exists: Supports the new metric naming strategy with prefixes.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Add method to increment prefix-based counters.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.why_exists: Provides the API for incrementing counters with prefixes.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Add method to create timers based on service type.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.why_exists: Provides the API for creating timers with service-specific prefixes.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/model/Pay.general_idea: Add Jackson annotation to ignore unknown properties during JSON deserialization.

Adopt Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify type checking and casting.
